Goal_Text: Student will identify the main idea and two supporting details in grade-level text with 80% accuracy across three trials.
Student will write a five-sentence paragraph including topic sentence, three details, and conclusion with minimal prompts.
Student will solve multi-step equations with 80% accuracy across three consecutive assessments.
Student will remain on-task during independent work for 15 minutes with no more than one prompt.
Student will use a planner to record assignments and due dates with 90% consistency across four weeks.
